title: troxirum reflexum
intro: Troxirum reflexum, also known as False Unicorn Root, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asparagus family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Troxirum reflexum include alleviating menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and respiratory issues, as well as supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Troxirum reflexum can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, and are often recommended for their potential to promote overall well-being.
intro_study: According to "Zhong xi yi jie he za zhi = Chinese journal of modern developments in traditional medicine", troxirum reflexum (also known as Rheum) benefits include retarding the progression rate of renal failure and improving uremic symptoms.
